allow: Bash(python -c "import pyembroidery, inspect; print\('write_dst' in dir\(pyembroidery\)\); print\(inspect.signature\(pyembroidery.write_dst\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./ecosystem.config.js'\); const a=c.apps.find\(x=>x.name==='storefront-payout-reconcile'\); console.log\('pm2 entry:', a? \(a.name+' cron='+a.cron_restart\):'MISSING'\)")
Bash(grep -n "Auto-pull Microsoft\\|Auto-pull Meta\\|The daily cron \(\\`storefront-adspend\\`\)" docs/channel-syndication-setup.md)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 3000,3001,3002,3007,3010,3020 } | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | Sort-Object LocalPort -Unique | ForEach-Object { $p = \(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "{0} -> PID {1} \({2}\)" -f $_.LocalPort, $_.OwningProcess, $p.ProcessName })

PowerShell($pm2 = \(Get-Command pm2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($pm2\) { pm2 jlist 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object name, pid, @{n='port';e={$_.pm2_env.env.PORT}}, @{n='status';e={$_.pm2_env.status}} | Format-Table -Auto } else { "pm2 not found on PATH" }; "--- PID 37868 \(port 3007\) ---"; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=37868" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).CommandLine)

PowerShell(foreach \($port in 3007,3010,3020\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($conn in $c\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\) on $port" } catch { "could not kill $\($conn.OwningProcess\): $_" } } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; "--- after 5s ---"; foreach \($port in 3007,3010,3020\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "$port still LISTENING \(PID $\($c[0].OwningProcess\)\) — likely respawned by a supervisor" } else { "$port free" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; foreach \($port in 3010,3020\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "$port LISTENING \(PID $\($c[0].OwningProcess\)\) ✓" } else { "$port not up yet" } })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3020 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c[0].OwningProcess -Force; "stopped old storefront \(PID $\($c[0].OwningProcess\)\)" } Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "3020 free: $\(-not \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3020 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3020 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "3020 LISTENING \(PID $\($c[0].OwningProcess\)\) ✓" } else { "not up" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3020 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c[0].OwningProcess -Force; "stopped old storefront" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2)
PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3020 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c[0].OwningProcess -Force; "stopped" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2)
PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3020 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c[0].OwningProcess -Force }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "stopped")
